hero.headline: Building products that matter
hero.supportingCopy: We make hardware, software, and physical products that work together to turn concepts into real products.

projects.heading: Our Projects
projects.subheadline: Projects that combine hardware, software, and physical products to solve real problems.

justin.name: JustIn
justin.description: A wireless fencing scoring system combining hardware sensors with a software app for real-time results.

zutto.name: Zutto
zutto.description: An integrated hardware and software solution for modern product development.

about.heading: Who We Are
about.mission: Nytsu Labs is a product studio that combines hardware, software, and physical projects into solutions people can use and appreciate. From prototypes to finished products, we focus on thoughtful design, practical functionality, and hands-on experimentation.
about.vision: We aim to be a studio where ideas take shape, whether as physical objects, software experiences, or a combination of both. Every project reflects our commitment to creating products that matter.
about.studioBody: Nytsu is never the headline — that belongs to the product. But every product carries our mark: a quiet signal that something was built with purpose, owned end-to-end, and refined until it was right.
